data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizing choices for users to streamline decision-making and improve navigation experience.
data.technical_spec: Interface structuring to reduce cognitive load and enhance user flow.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizing button sizes and positions to streamline user interactions and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Critical actions are placed within easy reach and visible to enhance usability.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Leverage appealing design to create perceived simplicity and function in user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Design elements balanced to ensure visual appeal alongside practical usability.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Adapting content presentation to align with limitations of short-term memory capacities.
data.technical_spec: Breaking information into chunks to ease cognitive processing and retention.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Enhancing content recall by prioritizing crucial information at the start and end of sessions.
data.technical_spec: Key actions and features positioned to maximize user recall at influential points.
